category_sources: Official GitHub README describes a Model Context Protocol server for Slack workspaces with stdio, SSE, and HTTP transports.
source_facts.description says it is an MCP Slack Server with transports and smart history fetch logic.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Slack MCP Server.
docs_sources: Official README documents tools, setup, and configuration: https://github.com/korotovsky/slack-mcp-server#readme.
Official repository contains a docs directory: https://github.com/korotovsky/slack-mcp-server/tree/master/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/korotovsky/slack-mcp-server; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists Slack MCP tools and supported transports.
source_facts.description identifies MCP, Slack, transports, and history fetching.
